message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
participant RMB
participant Node

Client -> RMB : Create an RMB message\n(cmd: zos.deployment.deploy, dat: base64(json(deployment)))
RMB -> Node : Decode payload(dat).\nSo node receive a deployment object
Node -> Node : Verify hash against contract hash\nVerify signature of the twin
Node -> RMB : Accepted Or Error
RMB -> Client : Response from the node

group If valid
  Node -> Node : Deploy
end

Client -> RMB : Get Deployment (cmd: zos.deployment.get)
RMB -> Node : Call get method
Node -> RMB : Get Response
RMB -> Client : Response
@enduml
